title: China's Coal Import Shift Continues; Intensifying Demand to Become Even Stronger
section_path: China's Coal Import Shift Continues; Intensifying Demand to Become Even Stronger
section_path_text: China's Coal Import Shift Continues; Intensifying Demand to Become Even Stronger
summary:
Main
By Jeffrey Landsberg
China's coal import data for June by origin was released recently and shows imports from Indonesia have remained the primary source of coal imports while the ban on Australia remains in place. June has marked the seventh straight month where China has not imported any Australian coal. Image reference: a1.jpg | assets/2021-07-28_chinas-coal-import-shift-continues-intensifying-demand-to-become-even-stronger_img_a1_ea14c25e0ee0.jpg
China imported 17 million tons of coal from Indonesia in June, which is up month-on-month by 5.8 million tons (52%) and up year-on-year by 6.2 million tons (57%).
